description: CURRENT_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, and NOW() return non-nullable date/time values
name: date_current_functions
query_sql:
-- @name CurrentDateTimestamp
-- @returns :one
SELECT CURRENT_DATE AS today, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS now_ts, NOW() AS now_fn
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE events (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, occurred_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL);
